landing.audience: Patients, caregivers, and providers who need specialty pharmacy, infusion, or medication coordination support.
landing.fear: Treatment will be delayed by paperwork, insurance friction, or fragmented communication.

hero.headline: Specialty pharmacy care that keeps patients supported and treatment moving.
hero.subheadline: HealthWave delivers specialty pharmacy care for complex, chronic, and rare conditions with benefits review, prior authorization support, and close collaboration with providers.
hero.booster: Patient-first support | No confusing handoffs | Provider-aligned follow-up

trust_bar.label: recommendation rate presented on the current homepage
partner companies referenced across the current site
customers served across the country in site messaging
coordinating patients, providers, and plans together

problem_section.headline: When treatment depends on specialty pharmacy care, delays and confusion feel personal fast.
problem_section.copy: Patients worry their medication will be delayed, insurance will stall the process, or the provider's office will be forced to chase paperwork instead of focusing on care.
pain_points: No one wants to guess whether authorizations are still moving.
Provider offices should not lose time to repetitive admin loops.
Patients with complex conditions need guidance, not another maze of callbacks.

benefits.headline: Get treatment moving with less friction
benefits.body: Benefits review and authorization support help reduce the drag that slows access to specialty medication and infusion care.

benefits.headline: Feel guided instead of overwhelmed
benefits.body: Patients get a more personal experience built around questions, support, and coordination rather than scattered updates.

benefits.headline: Keep providers focused on patient care
benefits.body: HealthWave works closely with prescribing offices so administrative steps are handled with fewer interruptions to clinical work.

seo.meta_description: Get specialty pharmacy care with patient-first coordination, faster authorization support, and provider collaboration from HealthWave.
seo.h1: Specialty pharmacy care that keeps patients supported and treatment moving.
